  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.

  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)

360 Photo Video booth 80cm Rotating Selfie Spinner Wedding LED Ring Light
content:
Description & Details

360 Photo Video booth 80cm Rotating Selfie Spinner Wedding LED Ring Light Description

Capture memorable moments from every angle with this immersive 360 photo booth. The perfect addition for any birthday, wedding, festival, or corporate event to create a unique experience that is sure to take your events business to the next level.

With a massive 80cm platform and a weight capacity of up to 400kg, there is plenty of space for up to 4 people to get involved in the fun. Four different sticker designs give you the flexibility to really make this photobooth your own and being removable means you can tailor it to the appropriate aesthetic of each event.

Remote control operated; guests can capture the entire experience with the click of a button. Compatible with a range of different devices including phones, tablets, DSLR cameras and GoPro's - each with their own unique attachment included - this photo booth is super versatile. Able to customise the speed, direction or turn the machine on or off, this remote also allows each user to tailor their experience. The arm can be adjusted between 40cm and 155cm and at an angle of 36 to 156 degrees, ideal for capturing a range of video content from products to people of all heights.

An RGB LED ring light ensures the lighting is always on point to capture high quality content every time. With 3 white shades, 12 dimmable settings and 40 RGB light settings to choose from - all interchangeable through a remote control - you can easily adapt it to suit the surroundings. This can be matched to the LED strip lights around the base to create a mesmerising feature that is sure to be the star of any event.

A pre-fitted rechargeable battery gives this photo booth the complete flexibility to be moved about and used in various locations. Lasting for up to an incredible 6 hours it can provide heaps of entertainment long into the night. But if you really don't want the fun to end it can also be plugged into the mains for a constant power supply.

We have included a money gun complete with paper money and additional photo props, making this the full party package.

Safety is always at the forefront of all our products and with the emergency stop pedal, this 360 photo booth is no exception.

Travelling between events is made easy with the hardwearing flight case which can compactly store all components and accessories. Attached wheels make it effortless to manoeuvre and the included fixing kit allows you to quickly assemble the photobooth upon arrival.

What are you waiting for, get your event off to a spin with this versatile 360 photo booth!

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.

Serpentine Duo Top Handle
content: Exuding a sophisticated and exclusive appeal, the Serpentine Duo tote bag combines jewellery-inspired details, evoking the serpent's sinuous movements, with an exceptional high-end workmanship. Masterfully crafted with a midnight plum Mosaic Embroidery applied into satin – a cascade of hand-sewn sequins in different sizes, shapes and shades results into a stunning play of lights and three-dimensional effect. Featuring two snake body-shaped handles embellished with engraved scales, whose design draws inspiration from a bold 1960s Serpenti Bvlgari watch, the model is made of a single open compartment, an internal flat pocket and a zipped pocket. 21.5 x 15 x 6 cm - 8.5 x 5.9 x 2.4 inches. Made in Italy.

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1
  3. Power lead x2
  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Processor: Intel i5
  • RAM: 8GB
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB
  • Keywords: Gaming

title: (Ambient Light) Led Video Light Photographic Video Adjustable Professional Fill Light For Studio
content:
Description & Details

Summary

  • This is a photographic must-have, high color rendering, adjustable aperture, dual heat dissipation, using COB lamp beads and strong light lens.
  • With color chips, installed in the collar, you can achieve different creative effects.
  • Three color temperatures, 0-100% brightness can be adjusted at will.
  • Turning the aperture counterclockwise makes the aperture smaller, and turning it clockwise makes the aperture larger.
  • Great for shooting a variety of portraits and objects, suitable for studio use.

(Ambient Light) Led Video Light Photographic Video Adjustable Professional Fill Light For Studio Description

  • This is a photographic must-have, high color rendering, adjustable aperture, dual heat dissipation, using COB lamp beads and strong light lens.
  • With color chips, installed in the collar, you can achieve different creative effects.
  • Three color temperatures, 0-100% brightness can be adjusted at will.
  • Turning the aperture counterclockwise makes the aperture smaller, and turning it clockwise makes the aperture larger.
  • Great for shooting a variety of portraits and objects, suitable for studio use.
  • Note: Tripod bracket is not included, you need to match it yourself.
  • Product Power: 50W
  • Color Temperature: 3000-6000K
  • Weight: 800g
  • Color: Single White Light, Two Colors Light, Ambient Light(optional)

title: (GTLN HIIT Bench (Only)) GTLN® MULTI-FUNCTION DUMBBELL BENCH
content:
Description & Details

(GTLN HIIT Bench (Only)) GTLN® MULTI-FUNCTION DUMBBELL BENCH Description

The GTLN® Multi-Function Bench is probably the missing piece of your home or commercial gym! Offering brilliant dumbbell and kettlebell storage within a sleek and attractive design. Perfect for HIIT and circuit-based training where the participants are allocated lanes or zones in which to work out.

 

STORAGE DUMBBELL BENCH SPECIFICATION

  • 10 x Individual dumbbell holders (Round or Hex), max dumbbell weigh 20kg
  • 2 x Kettlebell or similar size storage at front and rear
  • Bench Inclines to near vertical, perfect for bench and shoulder press
  • Battle rope hooks to the rear
  • Padded upholstery for excellent comfort 
  • Heavy-duty wheels at the front allow easy transportation
  • Zero assembly - Lift out the box and you're ready to go!
  • Heavy Duty - At a sturdy 47kg, this bench is built to last, even in commercial conditions

 

Available on its own or with our complete training package which includes:

2 x 2.5kg, 5kg, 7.5kg, 10kg, and 12.5kg Rubber Hex Dumbbells (As pictured)

1 x 12kg neoprene dumbbell

Discover the Future of Entertainment: Panasonic TX55MX950B Ultra 4K Mini LED Smart TV

Introducing the Panasonic TX55MX950B Ultra 4K Mini LED Smart TV a true marvel of visual technology that brings your entertainment to life with unparalleled clarity and vibrancy. Immerse yourself in the stunning world of 4K Ultra HD resolution, where every detail is rendered with astonishing precision. With a crystal-clear 65-inch display, this TV creates a cinematic experience right in the comfort of your home.

Experience fluid motion like never before with the 120hz refresh rate of the Panasonic TX55MX950B. Whether you're watching action-packed movies or playing the latest high-speed games, this TV ensures smooth transitions and eliminates motion blur, delivering an incredibly lifelike viewing experience. The addition of Auto Low Latency Mode further enhances your gaming sessions by reducing input lag, keeping you in the heart of the action with instantaneous responses.

Boasting the advanced 4K Colour Engine PRO, this TV guarantees a spectrum of rich and true-to-life hues that pop off the screen. From the deepest blacks to the brightest whites, every shade is meticulously balanced for a visual feast that captures the essence of realism. Seamlessly switch between your favourite channels and catch your preferred shows in stunning detail with Freeview HD, offering a wide range of content for endless entertainment.

Unleash your gaming potential with the dedicated Gaming Mode of the Panasonic TX55MX950B. This feature optimizes the TV's settings for gaming, ensuring minimal input lag and optimal visual performance. Whether you're a casual gamer or a competitive enthusiast, this TV provides the edge you need to excel in the virtual world. Elevate your entertainment setup with the Panasonic TX55MX950B Ultra 4K Mini LED Smart TV and indulge in a new era of visual excellence that redefines your perception of home entertainment.

title: Ovwanren Yoga Headstand Bench- Stand Yoga Chair for Family, Gym - Wood and PU
content:
Description & Details

Ovwanren Yoga Headstand Bench- Stand Yoga Chair for Family, Gym - Wood and PU Description

1.Healthy and Fun: With this convenient headstand bench, it's now easy to build your balance, relieve stress and tension, and simply feel better. Yoga is relaxing, rejuvenating, and healthy, all at once.

2.Safe and Stable: Grippy non-slip legs keep your chair in place as you invert, stretch, balance, and flex. It is very popular among yoga lovers and the preferred choice of many yoga beginners.

3.Benefits of Headstand: Our yoga inversion chair can not only help you decompress your neck and relieve back pain, but also promotes blood circulation, relieves stress and tension, helps improve concentration and balance, relieves fatigue, improves sleep, and helps you lose weight.

4.Multifunctional Yoga Bench: You can try out a variety of postures in your daily yoga practice. In addition, the detachable T-shaped block can be used as a yoga block, and the yoga stool can also be used as a footstool or a shoe-changing stool.

5.Easy to Install & Use: The accompanying installation instructions and easy-to-use tools make it possible to quickly assemble the product. You can assemble the product within a few minutes. The yoga inversion bench can be used in yoga rooms, bedrooms, balconies, offices, gyms, and outdoors. It is a great gift for your friends and loved ones.

content:
Description & Details

Summary

  • This is a photographic must-have, high color rendering, adjustable aperture, dual heat dissipation, using COB lamp beads and strong light lens.
  • With color chips, installed in the collar, you can achieve different creative effects.
  • Three color temperatures, 0-100% brightness can be adjusted at will.
  • Turning the aperture counterclockwise makes the aperture smaller, and turning it clockwise makes the aperture larger.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.

  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB
